case_title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. MARY GAINES ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE / $8.06 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAINES, MARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1880 PINE STREET, # 512 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94109 SAN FRANCISCO, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 68054608)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 68054608) AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, MARY DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, MARY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, MARY DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 67991172), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA SERVED AUG-21-2022, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, MARY DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 67991172), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA SERVED AUG-21-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, MARY
DECLARATION RE: RENTAL AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 68054608) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, MARY
